porting_lib.configuration.uitext.title: %s Configuration
porting_lib.configuration.uitext.notonli: Settings in here are determined by the server and cannot be changed while online.
porting_lib.configuration.uitext.notlan: Settings in here cannot be edited while your game is open to LAN. Please return to the main menu and load the world again.
porting_lib.configuration.uitext.notload: Settings in here are only available while a world is loaded.
porting_lib.configuration.uitext.unsuppo: This value cannot be edited in the UI. Please contact the mod author about providing a custom UI for it.
porting_lib.configuration.uitext.longstr: This value is too long to be edited in the UI. Please edit it in the config file.
porting_lib.configuration.uitext.undo.to: Reverts changes on this screen only.
porting_lib.configuration.uitext.reset.t: Reverts everything on this screen to its default value.
porting_lib.configuration.uitext.restart: One or more of the configuration option that were changed will only take effect when the game is started.
One or more of the configuration option that were changed will only take effect when the world is reloaded.
Your changes will have no effect until you restart!
porting_lib_config.configgui.logUntransl: A config option mainly for developers. Logs out configuration values that do not have translations when running a client in a development environment.
